plugins.name: product-dev
plugins.description: AI-assisted product development framework — vague idea to technical spec through structured UX research, hypothesis formation, and prototype planning. Ships 5 commands (/idea, /problem, /spec, /compile, /summary), 4 skills, and a tech-spec-writer subagent.

plugins.name: clownware-code-tools
plugins.description: Universal dev workflow skills — architecture/deployment-readiness auditing (/arch-audit), security auditing (/security-audit), test-suite auditing (/test-audit), Claude Code skill auditing (/skill-audit), design-system auditing (/design-audit), accessibility auditing (/a11y-audit), dependency auditing (/deps-audit), performance auditing (/perf-audit), audit-fix application (/audit-fix), plugin releasing (/plugin-release), skill validation (/skill-validate), ADR authoring, PR descriptions, root-cause debugging, and test scaffolding — that probe the repo they run in and degrade gracefully.

plugins.name: clownware-astro-tools
plugins.description: Astro + Preact stack skills — component scaffolding, template-aware PR descriptions, and performance-budget gate checks (/perf-budget-check) — following astro-performance-starter conventions with fallbacks for other Astro projects.

plugins.name: pezza-design-system
plugins.description: The Pezza brand design system as a skill — design guidelines, color/type/spacing tokens, logo and photography assets, React component primitives, and two UI kit starters (web-app shell and DJ/producer site) — for generating on-brand interfaces, artifacts, and production code.
